title: DRILL 2.15 Assessing Stability by Characteristic Roots
summary: This page concludes an example by factoring characteristic polynomials, listing characteristic roots, and classifying four systems by asymptotic and BIBO stability. It also includes Figure 2.20 showing root locations and introduces Drill 2.15 on determining stability from characteristic roots.

figures.caption: Characteristic root locations for the systems of Ex. 2.14, shown as four s-plane root plots labeled (a) through (d).
